Introduction
    Childhood friends Ho Tae and Dong Hee reunite after years. Dong Hee harbors feelings for Ho Tae, who experiences new emotions toward her but dates girls. An incident strains their relationship dynamics.

Also known as: 當我的指尖觸碰到你的溫度時
